title: Remarriage Preparation Programme for Muslim Couples
text:
Remarriage Preparation Programme for Muslim Couples - SupportGoWhere
Remarriage Preparation Programme for Muslim Couples
Share link
Provides pre- and post-marriage support for remarrying couples.
SERVICE HIGHLIGHTS
Centre-based
Free
Referral not required
SERVICE PROVIDERS
Find service providers near you
Collapse all sections
About this support

Pre- and post-marriage support for remarrying couples and their dependent children (below 21) from previous marriage.

Who is this for?

One or both parties are marrying for the second time or more

At least one party is Singapore Citizen or Permanent Resident

One or both parties contemplating marriage or already in a stepfamily have at least one dependent child (below 21 years of age); and

Both parties contemplating marriage or already in a stepfamily, must be a Muslim.

What to expect?

Email or call the agency directly to request for more information on the Marriage Preparation Programme (MPP) and marriage support services.

Agency worker will assess and register them for MPP if they meet the criteria

Upon completion of MPP, agency worker will refer to FSCs or SSOs if they have higher risks.

Agency also refers eligible couples to KidStart.

How to apply?

Call, email, visit or through referrals by other agencies to apply.

Information last updated on 11 Sep 2025
